    C

    calculateDiameter(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
    Calculates the diameter of the graph (maximum shortest path length).
    calculateMSTCost(List<Edge>) - Static method in class algorithms.Kruskal
    Calculates the total weight of the edges in the MST.
    calculateRadius(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
    Calculates the radius of the graph (minimum eccentricity among all nodes).

    cancelReservation(String) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
    Cancels a reservation by its ID if it is cancellable.

    CONFIRMED - Enum constant in enum class models.Reservation.ReservationStatus
     
    confirmReservation(String) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
    Confirms a reservation by its ID if it's pending.
